steps.t: Erchar and Herion meet at the battleground. You should speak to Erchar.
The bodies of Gondorian warriors slain by the Corsair forces can be found at the battleground. You should cover the bodies with soil and pay your resp…
Herion is at the battleground. You should speak with Herion.
Erchar is at the battleground. You should speak with Erchar.
